FAIR MARKET VALUATION

IT Asset Buyback

Maximum Recovery, Zero Risk. Strategic corporate IT buyback solutions for AI server clusters, GPU servers, and enterprise infrastructure with bulk computer recycling options.

Valuation Process

1

Asset Declaration

Model, specs, condition, quantity

2

Market Analysis

Real-time secondary market pricing

3

Fair Offer

Transparent valuation, no hidden deductions

4

Secure Collection

Scheduled pickup, insured transport

5

Data Destruction

Included NIST 800-88 certified wiping

6

Same-Day Payment

BACS transfer on agreement

Security & Compliance

🛡️

Security-First Approach

Data destruction precedes any resale activity

🔒

Enterprise Security Protocol

Asset tracking from handover to remarketing

♻️

WEEE Compliant

Proper environmental processing if resale not viable

📋

Audit Trail

Complete chain of custody documentation

Accepted Equipment

Enterprise Laptops & Workstations

Business-grade computing devices for corporate IT buyback programs

AI Server Clusters

NVIDIA H100, A100, RTX A6000 configurations for bulk server buyback and IT asset remarketing

Edge Computing Nodes

Industrial IoT, 5G infrastructure, micro datacenters for enterprise hardware resale programs

GPU Accelerators

High-performance computing graphics processors for AI hardware buyback

HPC Infrastructure

High-performance computing systems and datacenter decommissioning projects

Networking Gear & Mobile Devices

Enterprise networking equipment and smartphones for bulk computer recycling
